nodes.title: Apply Status Effect
nodes.description: Given a character and a StatusEffect, when ApplyStatusEffect() is called, then the effect is added to ActiveStatusEffects and its stat modifiers (AttackPower, Defense, Speed) are multiplied into the character's Stats.

nodes.title: Stack Existing Effect
nodes.description: Given a character already has a status effect of the same type, when ApplyStatusEffect() is called with a matching type, then StackEffect is called instead of adding a duplicate. For Hunger, modifiers recalculate based on new stack count.

nodes.title: Remove Status Effect
nodes.description: Given a character has a status effect, when RemoveStatusEffect(type) is called, then the effect's modifiers are reversed (stats divided by modifiers) and the effect is removed from ActiveStatusEffects.

nodes.title: Effect Expiry
nodes.description: Given a status effect with Duration > 0, when UpdateEffect is called with deltaTime, then RemainingTime decreases. When RemainingTime <= 0, IsExpired() returns true and the effect is auto-removed. Effects with Duration=0 never expire.

nodes.title: Damage Over Time
nodes.description: Given a status effect with DamagePerSecond > 0, when ApplyDamageOverTime is called each frame, then target takes (DamagePerSecond * deltaTime) damage via ApplyCustomDamage.

nodes.title: Create Hunger Effect
nodes.description: Given CreateHungerEffect(duration, stacks) is called, then returns a StatusEffect with: EffectType=Hunger, -12% atk/def/speed per stack, -20% stamina regen per stack, -25% Kynde gen per stack, DamagePerSecond = 1 * stacks.

nodes.title: Hunger Stack Remove
nodes.description: Given a character with Hunger (multiple stacks), when RemoveHungerStack() is called, then stack count decreases by 1 and modifiers recalculate. If 1 stack, Hunger is fully removed. Returns true if hunger was reduced.

nodes.title: Hunger Marks Save
nodes.description: Given a player character, when ApplyHunger() is called and the character is in TurnManager.PlayerCharacters, then SaveManager.MarkHasEverHadHunger() is called to set the persistent flag.

nodes.title: Create Hunger Scar
nodes.description: Given CreateHungerScarEffect() is called, then returns a permanent StatusEffect (Duration=0) with: EffectType=HungerScar, 0.95 atk, 0.93 def, 0.94 speed, 0.96 stamina regen, 1.03 Kynde gen.

nodes.title: Create Age Effect
nodes.description: Given CreateAgeEffect(tier) is called with tier > 0, then returns a permanent StatusEffect with: EffectType=Age, SpeedModifier=0.97^tier, DefenseModifier=1+tier*0.1, KyndeGenModifier=1.02^tier, StaminaRegenModifier=0.98^tier. Returns null for tier <= 0.

nodes.title: Create Frost Effect
nodes.description: Given a Frost status effect is created, then it has EffectType=Frost with appropriate speed reduction and duration.

nodes.title: Create Burning Effect
nodes.description: Given a Burning status effect is created, then it has EffectType=Burning with DamagePerSecond > 0 for damage over time and appropriate duration.

nodes.title: Stat Modifier Apply Remove
nodes.description: Given a status effect with stat modifiers, when ApplyEffect is called then stats are multiplied (e.g. AttackPower *= modifier). When RemoveEffect is called, stats are divided (AttackPower /= modifier). Division by zero is guarded (modifier > 0 check).
